title: Ulcerative colitis relief for caucasians through 11 herbal essential oils
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils, also known as ginger essential oil, has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate symptoms of ulcerative colitis. This condition is characterized by chronic inflammation and ulcers in the large intestine. The essential oil of ginger contains compounds like zingiberene, bisabolol, and gingerols, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and pain.
